temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A man with a menacing, wide-toothed grin peers through a broken doorway. His face is smeared with what appears to be blood or dirt, and his eyes dart around with a crazed expression. The scene is intercut with a shot of a dimly lit bedroom, where a lamp is on and a person is lying motionless on a bed. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a terrifying and violent tone, introducing a menacing character and implying a brutal event has occurred.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Maniacal, excited. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous musical score begins to build.)
(00:02-00:03) A woman with long dark hair screams in terror. Her eyes are wide with fear as she looks up, clutching a large, dark-handled knife to her chest in a defensive posture. (Storyline: This shot introduces a second character in a state of extreme fear, confirming she is a victim or is in the middle of a confrontation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Terrified, high-pitched scream. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous score continues.)
(00:04-00:05) The scene cuts back to the man with the bloody face, who is now laughing maniacally. His eyes are wide and his mouth is open in a crazed, unhinged expression as he continues to stare through the broken doorway. (Storyline: The man's laughter confirms his villainous and cruel nature, showing his delight in the terror he is causing.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Hysterical, cruel laughter. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense score swells.)
